zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony於1324年出生在海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛藍德可萊斯 維騰格時，她的父親Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg40歲，母親Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin10歲。她於1342年9月17日與Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年3月23日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 麥-斯培薩特比可費爾德享年60歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 麥-斯培薩特比可費爾德。

Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg40岁，母亲Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin10岁。她于1342年9月17日与Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年3月23日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 麥-斯培薩特比可費爾德享年60岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 麥-斯培薩特比可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony was born in 1324, in Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prussia, her father, Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg, was 40 and her mother, Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, was 10. She married Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II on 17 September 1342, in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 23 March 1384, in Birkenfeld, Main-Spessart, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 60, and was buried in Birkenfeld, Main-Spessart, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony est née en 1324, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Prusse, son père, Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II le 17 septembre 1342, à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1384, à Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.Wittenberg, Saxony, Germany: Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony 1324 in Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin 10. Sie hat am 17. September 1342 in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. März 1384 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony è nata il nel 1324 nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, sua padre, Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II il 17 settembre 1342, nel Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 marzo 1384, nel Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxonyが1324年にプレウssンプロヴィンズ サチセンランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグで生まれた時，父Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenbergは40歳，母Agnes von Lindow-Ruppinは10歳であった。1342年9月17日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートでConde Eberhard von Württemberg IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年3月23日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス メイン-スペッサルトバーケンフエルドで60歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス メイン-スペッサルトバーケンフエルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Wittenberg, Saxony, Germany: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈스 프 사스니 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony(이)가 1324년 플레우ss 플로빈츠 작센 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1342년 9월 17일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 3월 23일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 맹-스페사르트 비르켄펠드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 맹-스페사르트 비르켄펠드에 묻혔다.

pt.Wittenberg, Saxony, Germany: Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony nasceu em 1324, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, seu pai, Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II em 17 de setembro de 1342, em Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1384, em Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Alemanha, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Wittenberg, Saxony, Germany: ландкрис виттенбирг, провинц оф саксони, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony родилась в 1324 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, провинз сачсен, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II 17 сентября 1342 г. в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 марта 1384 г. в местности биркенфелд, ландкрис меин-спессарт, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности биркенфелд, ландкрис меин-спессарт, беиирн, Германия.

es.Wittenberg, Saxony, Germany: Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Henneberg-Schleusingen princess of saxony nació en 1324, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, su papá, Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Conde Eberhard von Württemberg II el 17 de septiembre de 1342, en Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1384, en Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Birkenfeld, Landkreis Main-Spessart, Bayern, Alemania.
